title: When Oprah backed Morehouse scholars, the gift reached far beyond tuition
summary_full: Oprah Winfrey's $25 million, 30-year endowment to Morehouse College redefines educational philanthropy. Moving beyond mere tuition, this initiative fosters holistic development, including leadership training and global expeditions. This long-term investment cultivates character and creates lasting impact, empowering students for lifelong success and demonstrating the power of sustained support over one-off aid.
